name: financial_services_near_miss_event_millhaven_lib_eq
premise: A custody client’s API key rotation failed; downstream settlement bots are retrying in a tight loop against production endpoints. In Financial Services, the situation tagged internally around financial services near miss event millhaven lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. An automated batch or failover job is scheduled at the top of the hour; after it runs, rollback cost jumps by an order of magnitude. The organization’s past incidents make liberty feel morally loud today, while equality is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Omar Bennett
agents.identity: I am Omar Bennett, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Financial Services. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Talia Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Talia Ishikawa, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Financial Services. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of equality.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of liberty even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Omar Bennett must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Omar Bennett do?
